case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $892.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM [H & S 11469 ET SEQ.] FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA SERVED SEP-26-2006, MAIL AS TO CLAIMANT FRY, CONRAD J

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $892.00; $9,720.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY CHE HASHIM ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT CONRAD J. FRY. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
